dynamic.smartess_cloud_diagnostics_hint: **SmartESS cloud:** {detail} **Create support archive** can already include saved SmartESS cloud evidence and can fetch a fresh copy inline in the same step. Use **Export SmartESS cloud evidence** only when you need the cloud bundle itself for **Advanced metadata tools** or for separate review. The visible entity count may stay the same when existing entities are upgraded instead of creating new IDs.
dynamic.smartess_cloud_diagnostics_detail_bridge: Current SmartESS cloud evidence is ready to generate a SmartESS SMG bridge for this runtime.
dynamic.smartess_cloud_diagnostics_detail_draft: Current SmartESS cloud evidence is ready to generate a SmartESS draft for this runtime.
dynamic.smartess_cloud_diagnostics_detail_refres: SmartESS cloud evidence is already saved for this entry and can be refreshed after app-side changes.
dynamic.smartess_cloud_diagnostics_detail_availa: SmartESS cloud evidence is available for this entry even if local detection is already high-confidence.
dynamic.support_archive_cloud_mode_refresh: Fetch or refresh SmartESS cloud evidence now
dynamic.support_archive_cloud_mode_archive_only: Create the archive without SmartESS cloud evidence
dynamic.support_archive_cloud_plan_saved_refresh: Saved SmartESS cloud evidence will be included automatically, or you can refresh it in this same step before the archive is built.
dynamic.support_archive_cloud_plan_saved_only: Saved SmartESS cloud evidence will be included automatically when it matches this entry.
dynamic.support_archive_cloud_plan_refreshable: No SmartESS cloud evidence is saved yet. You can fetch it in this step and include it in the same archive, or continue without it.
dynamic.support_archive_cloud_plan_unavailable: No SmartESS cloud evidence is currently available for this entry.
dynamic.support_archive_cloud_result_refreshed: Fresh SmartESS cloud evidence was fetched in this step and included in the archive.
dynamic.support_archive_cloud_result_saved: Saved SmartESS cloud evidence was included in the archive.
dynamic.support_archive_cloud_result_none: No SmartESS cloud evidence was included in the archive.
dynamic.no_diagnostics_action: No diagnostics action has been run yet.
dynamic.welcome_autoscan_single: When you continue, {integration_name} will start scanning automatically using **{selected_interface}**.
dynamic.welcome_autoscan_multi: When you continue, {integration_name} will start scanning automatically using **{selected_interface}**. You can change the scan interface from the results screen if needed.
dynamic.manual_probe_confirmed: {peer_label_capitalized} and inverter were confirmed with the manual settings.
dynamic.manual_probe_smartess_hint: The {peer_label} responded and exposed SmartESS metadata, but the local inverter model is still unconfirmed.
dynamic.manual_probe_unconfirmed_model: The {peer_label} responded, but the inverter model is still unconfirmed.
dynamic.manual_probe_none: No {peer_label} or inverter was confirmed yet.
dynamic.manual_control_summary: If you continue, a **read-only Pending Device** will be created. In Home Assistant it appears as **EyeBond Setup Pending**. Sensors may stay unavailable until the {peer_label} connects and detection completes.
dynamic.manual_control_summary_smartess_hint: If you continue, a **read-only Pending Device** will be created. In Home Assistant it appears as **EyeBond Setup Pending**. Sensors may stay unavailable until a local driver match is confirmed. This local probe does not rule out SmartESS app support; the app may still use a separate cloud identity.
dynamic.manual_probe_next_actions: Choose **{probe_again_action_label}** to test again, **{edit_settings_action_label}** to change the values, or **{create_pending_action_label}** to save the read-only Pending Device now.
dynamic.auto_interface_hint_multi: Choose which Home Assistant interface the {peer_label} should connect back to.
dynamic.welcome_connection_type_single: Choose the connection type first. On the next step you can start a quick scan using **{selected_interface}**, run a deep scan, or switch to manual setup.
dynamic.welcome_connection_type_multi: Choose the connection type first. The wizard will then ask which Home Assistant network interface to use, and from there you can start a quick scan, run a deep scan, or switch to manual setup.
dynamic.scan_no_results_summary: No reachable {peer_label_plural} or inverters were found.
dynamic.scan_no_results_next_with_deep: Use **{refresh_action_label}** to try again, **{deep_scan_action_label}** to scan the full local network, or **{manual_action_label}** to switch to manual setup.
dynamic.scan_no_results_next: Use **{refresh_action_label}** to try again, or **{manual_action_label}** to switch to manual setup.
dynamic.scan_all_added_summary: Found **{detected_count}** device candidate(s), but all of them are already configured.
dynamic.scan_all_added_next_with_deep: Use **{refresh_action_label}** to look again, **{deep_scan_action_label}** to search the full local network, or **{manual_action_label}** if you intentionally need a different connection path.
dynamic.scan_all_added_next: Use **{refresh_action_label}** to look again, or **{manual_action_label}** if you intentionally need a different connection path.
dynamic.scan_none_addable_summary: Found **{detected_count}** device candidate(s), but none are ready to add yet.
dynamic.scan_none_addable_next_with_deep: Use **{refresh_action_label}** to try again, **{deep_scan_action_label}** to check the full local network, or **{manual_action_label}** to override the connection settings.
dynamic.scan_none_addable_next: Use **{refresh_action_label}** to try again, or **{manual_action_label}** to override the connection settings.
dynamic.scan_pending_summary: Found **{detected_count}** device candidate(s). **{available_count}** collector candidate(s) can be added now, but local inverter matching is still pending.
dynamic.scan_pending_next: Choose **{choose_action_label}** to save the Pending Device now, or use **{refresh_action_label}** or **{manual_action_label}** to retry the local match.
dynamic.scan_ready_summary: Found **{detected_count}** device candidate(s). **{available_count}** can be added now, **{already_added_count}** already configured. Ready now: {ready_summary}.
dynamic.scan_ready_next: Choose **{choose_action_label}** to pick which inverter to add.
dynamic.scan_progress_hint: Most scans finish in 5-15 seconds. This progress bar is estimated from the current phase and timeout.
dynamic.scan_progress_hint_deep: Deep scans keep the same discovery flow but also probe the rest of the selected IPv4 network. Large subnets can take several minutes.
dynamic.choose_summary: **{available_count}** detected device candidate(s) can be added right now. Already configured devices are excluded.
dynamic.deep_scan_warning_unknown_network: Home Assistant did not report the subnet mask for this interface. Deep scan will fall back to the currently reachable local subnet only.
dynamic.deep_scan_warning_empty_network: The selected interface does not expose any additional IPv4 addresses to probe beyond Home Assistant itself.
dynamic.deep_scan_warning_long: This network contains about {target_count} candidate addresses. The deep scan can take around {estimated_duration} before the results screen appears.
dynamic.deep_scan_warning_short: The deep scan keeps the initial broadcast probe and then checks the rest of this IPv4 network directly.
dynamic.control_read_only: Monitoring only — no control entities are exposed.
dynamic.control_waiting: Monitoring only until a high-confidence detection is confirmed.
dynamic.smartess_cloud_offer_summary: Local detection is not yet high-confidence for collector `{collector_pn}`. SmartESS cloud assist can fetch extra identity and settings evidence before the entry is created.
dynamic.smartess_cloud_summary_known_family: **SmartESS cloud:** suggests **{family_label}** and pre-fills local metadata hints for `{driver_key}`. Settings surface: exact {exact_count}, probable {probable_count}, cloud-only {cloud_only_count}. Local controls stay disabled until a high-confidence local detection is confirmed.
dynamic.smartess_cloud_summary_generic: **SmartESS cloud:** evidence was saved for this collector, but no safe local family mapping was resolved yet. Settings surface: exact {exact_count}, probable {probable_count}, cloud-only {cloud_only_count}.
dynamic.smartess_cloud_status_failed: Last SmartESS cloud assist attempt failed: {error}
dynamic.smartess_cloud_highlights_empty: **Highlighted SmartESS fields:** no compact field preview was captured.
dynamic.smartess_cloud_detail_sections_missing: **Cloud detail sections:** no normalized section breakdown was captured.
dynamic.smartess_cloud_mapping_reason_missing: No safe local family mapping was resolved yet. The evidence is still saved for later diagnostics and support work.
dynamic.profile_activation_hint: Leave the suggested file name unchanged if you want the local draft to override the built-in profile after reload.
dynamic.schema_activation_hint: Leave the suggested file name unchanged if you want the local draft to override the built-in register schema after reload.
dynamic.return_to_diagnostics: Return to diagnostics to run another action.
dynamic.support_workflow_experimental_summary: Local experimental metadata is active for this entry.
dynamic.support_workflow_experimental_next_actio: Reload and test the local metadata changes. If support is still incomplete, create a support archive and send the ZIP file to the developer.
dynamic.support_workflow_experimental_step_2: Confirm that the local override is active and test the inverter again.
dynamic.support_workflow_experimental_step_3: If support is still incomplete, create a support archive and send the ZIP file to the developer.
dynamic.support_workflow_experimental_advanced_h: Advanced metadata is already active here. Use the advanced tools to iterate on the local override, not as the first troubleshooting step.
dynamic.support_workflow_unknown_summary: No supported inverter driver is matched right now.
dynamic.support_workflow_unknown_next_action: Create a support archive and send the ZIP file to the developer. It will include collector evidence and generic raw register capture for review.
dynamic.support_workflow_unknown_step_2: Send the ZIP file to the developer.
dynamic.support_workflow_unknown_step_3: Wait for built-in support before working with local experimental metadata.
dynamic.support_workflow_unknown_advanced_hint: Do not start with local drafts here. The first goal is to collect evidence the developer can analyze.
dynamic.support_workflow_pending_summary: A driver base is known, but the inverter is not currently confirmed.
dynamic.support_workflow_pending_next_action: Create a support archive and send the ZIP file to the developer before editing local drafts.
dynamic.support_workflow_pending_step_2: Send the ZIP file to the developer.
dynamic.support_workflow_pending_step_3: Only move on to local drafts after the developer reviews the evidence.
dynamic.support_workflow_pending_advanced_hint: Treat local drafts as a second-stage tool here. First confirm connectivity or send the support evidence.
dynamic.support_workflow_smartess_pending_summar: The collector exposed SmartESS metadata, but no local inverter driver is matched yet.
dynamic.support_workflow_smartess_pending_next_a: Create a support archive and send the ZIP file to the developer. SmartESS app support can still rely on a separate cloud-normalized identity even when the local descriptor is generic, missing, or incomplete.
dynamic.support_workflow_smartess_pending_step_2: Send the ZIP file to the developer.
dynamic.support_workflow_smartess_pending_step_3: Treat the local SmartESS descriptor as collector evidence only until a built-in mapping is confirmed.
dynamic.support_workflow_smartess_pending_advanc: Do not treat a generic or missing local SmartESS descriptor as proof that the inverter is unsupported in the SmartESS app.
dynamic.support_workflow_family_fallback_summary: This inverter is using the generic SMG family fallback. Built-in writes are intentionally disabled until the exact model is verified.
dynamic.support_workflow_family_fallback_next_ac: Create a support archive and send the ZIP file to the developer. This will help confirm the exact SMG-family model and move it beyond the read-only fallback.
dynamic.support_workflow_family_fallback_step_2: Send the ZIP file to the developer.
dynamic.support_workflow_family_fallback_step_3: Treat the current SMG support as read-only until the exact model is verified.
dynamic.support_workflow_family_fallback_advance: Do not create local writable drafts for this device yet. The current fallback is intentionally read-only and unverified.
dynamic.support_workflow_builtin_summary: Built-in support is active for this inverter.
dynamic.support_workflow_builtin_next_action: Use Create Support Archive only if you want to report a bug, capture more evidence, or help extend support for a related model.
dynamic.support_workflow_builtin_step_2: Create a support archive only if you need to report a bug or help extend support.
dynamic.support_workflow_builtin_step_3: Send the ZIP file to the developer if requested.
dynamic.support_workflow_builtin_advanced_hint: You usually do not need advanced metadata tools in this state. Use them only for deliberate experimental work.
dynamic.support_workflow_partial_summary: The inverter is reachable, but built-in support is only partially confirmed.
dynamic.support_workflow_partial_next_action: Create a support archive and send the ZIP file to the developer before creating local experimental drafts.
dynamic.support_workflow_partial_step_2: Send the ZIP file to the developer.
dynamic.support_workflow_partial_step_3: Use local experimental metadata only if the developer asks for it.
dynamic.support_workflow_partial_advanced_hint: Do not start editing drafts yet. The developer should look at the support archive first.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_ensure_entry_loaded: Ensure the entry is loaded and the inverter has been detected, then try again.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_support_archive_faile: Check whether the entry is loaded and the Home Assistant config directory is writable, then try again.
Check the SmartESS credentials, or rerun Create support archive and choose a different SmartESS cloud evidence mode.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_support_archive_creat:
A combined support archive with runtime data, raw capture evidence, an anonymized replay fixture, and matching SmartESS cloud evidence when available was written to the Home Assistant config directory.

{support_archive_cloud_detail}
Send this single ZIP file to the developer. Create local experimental drafts only after the archive has been reviewed.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_wait_for_entry_loaded: Wait for the entry to finish loading, then try again.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_reload_local_metadata: Local metadata caches were cleared and the entry reload was requested.
Refresh the device page after the entry reconnects to confirm whether local overrides were applied.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_rollback_local_metada: No active managed local metadata override is available to roll back for this entry.
Create or activate a local override first, or use Reload local metadata if the files were already removed manually.
Check whether the active override files still exist under /config/eybond_local/, then try again.
The active managed local override files were removed and the entry reload was requested.
Refresh the device page after the entry reconnects to confirm that the built-in metadata is active again.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_support_bundle_export: A support bundle was written to the Home Assistant config directory.
Use the JSON bundle for troubleshooting or as source material for a new local experimental draft.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_smartess_cloud_eviden: A SmartESS cloud bundle was written to the Home Assistant config directory and linked to this entry by collector identity.

Open Advanced metadata tools to review what can be generated from this evidence. If local overrides already exist, reload local metadata there after updating them, or create a support archive to share the evidence with the developer.
Open Advanced metadata tools to create the SmartESS SMG bridge, then reload local metadata to apply it. If you only need the evidence, create a support archive instead.
Open Advanced metadata tools to create the SmartESS draft, then reload local metadata to apply it. If you only need the evidence, create a support archive instead.
Check the SmartESS credentials and collector mapping, then run the export again.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_smartess_smg_bridge_u: No safe SmartESS SMG bridge is available for this entry yet.
Export SmartESS cloud evidence first, or wait until enough SmartESS fields match the active SMG runtime metadata.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_smartess_smg_bridge_c: A SmartESS-backed SMG bridge draft was created and will override the built-in metadata after reload.
A SmartESS-backed SMG bridge draft was created, but it will not override the built-in metadata automatically.
Reload local metadata and verify that the bridge exposes the additional SMG controls and config readbacks you expect.
Rename the draft outputs to {profile_name} and {schema_name} if you want them to override the built-in metadata automatically, then reload local metadata.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_smartess_smg_bridge_f: Re-export SmartESS cloud evidence or adjust the output file names, then try again.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_smartess_draft_unavai: No safe SmartESS known-family draft source is available for this entry yet.
Export SmartESS cloud evidence first, or wait until a known SmartESS family mapping is confirmed.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_smartess_draft_create: SmartESS-derived local profile and schema drafts were created and will override the built-in metadata after reload.
SmartESS-derived local profile and schema drafts were created, but they will not override the built-in metadata automatically.
Reload local metadata and verify the generated SmartESS draft against the live inverter. Create a support archive afterward if you want to share the result.
Rename the draft outputs to {profile_name} and {schema_name} if you want them to override the built-in metadata automatically, then reload local metadata.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_smartess_draft_failed: Re-export SmartESS cloud evidence or adjust the output file names, then try again.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_profile_draft_unavail: No detected driver profile is available for this entry.
Run detection again or set a manual driver hint before creating a local draft.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_profile_draft_created: A local experimental profile draft was created and will override the built-in profile after reload.
A local experimental profile draft was created, but it will not override the built-in profile automatically.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_draft_reload_next: Edit the draft, then reload local metadata to activate it.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_draft_rename_profile_: Rename the draft to {name} if you want it to override the built-in profile automatically, then reload local metadata.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_register_schema_unava: No detected register schema is available for this entry.
Run detection again or set a manual driver hint before creating a local draft.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_register_schema_draft: A local experimental register schema draft was created and will override the built-in schema after reload.
A local experimental register schema draft was created, but it will not override the built-in schema automatically.
dynamic.diagnostics_result_draft_rename_schema_n: Rename the draft to {name} if you want it to override the built-in schema automatically, then reload local metadata.
